title: Wrap Dropdown Selections when Item Height Adjusted to Double/Triple
excerpt: It would be extremely helpful if the selections in a dropdown column would wrap in the space provided when the Item Height is adjusted from single to double/triple height. The text columns wrap, but the dropdown items st…

posts.author: cdf (Carrie d.)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be extremely helpful if the selections in a dropdown column would wrap in the space provided when the Item Height is adjusted from single to double/triple height. The text columns wrap, but the dropdown items still remain single height, even if there is room when the item height is adjusted.
